about title: New World Telecom is a reliable partner that can handle a variety of different project types.
about text: New World Telecom LLC is a reliable, nationwide general contractor specializing in both wireless tower construction and full-spectrum fiber network infrastructure. Our ability to adapt and be flexible, combined with the experience of a diversified team, gives us a true edge in the telecom construction industry. We handle a wide variety of project types — from new tower builds, upgrades, and 5G small cell construction to fiber deployment, underground conduit systems, splicing, testing, and long-term maintenance. NWT has demonstrated proven success regardless of the size, scope, or budget of the project. Our field team consists of highly skilled and certified technical specialists, holding all necessary industry certifications to perform work safely, efficiently, and to the highest standard. Behind every project, our dedicated office professionals ensure seamless execution through expert support in Project Management, Construction Management, Closeouts, Material Procurement, Logistics, and more.Together, our field and office teams operate as one unit — delivering high-quality, end-to-end solutions across the U.S., from project kickoff to final closeout. Network engineering companies rely on us to manage critical phases with precision, clear communication, and on-time delivery. Whether your project demands wireless infrastructure expertise or fiber network solutions, New World Telecom LLC has the team, the certifications, and the commitment to get it done right.
team title: At New World Telecom, we believe that our team is one of our greatest assets.
team text: Our team is made up of highly skilled and certified professionals who take pride in their work. Safety is our top priority, and we are committed to completing all projects to the highest industry standards.
